task_description: Deep Critical Analysis Round 5 - THE FINAL ROUND. Implement 6 remaining critical fixes: Mode 2 protocol documentation, skill content token limits, graceful shutdown/interrupt handling, skill creation workflow, external event detection, and user-friendly error messages. Each feature committed separately.

verification.summary: 894 tests pass with 98.73% coverage after review fixes. All 6 features plus review fixes implemented, tested, and committed. Coverage well above 90% threshold.

review_fixes.description: Addressed v1 review findings: wired EventDetector into runner loop, threaded state through apply_change, replaced subprocess.run with Popen for signal safety, fixed hard truncation to cut at line boundaries.
review_fixes.findings: All 894 tests pass at 98.73% coverage. Updated 10 files (3 source + 7 test files). Popen pattern required updating all test mocks from subprocess.run to subprocess.Popen.
